title: Robust Rehydrated Vietnamese Shrimp Bun Rieu
description: A funky, savory soup featuring chewy rehydrated dried shrimp and a rich tomato broth designed to satisfy intense cravings.

ingredients.name: dried shrimp
ingredients.notes: soaked in hot water for 20 minutes then drained

instructions: Soak the dried shrimp in boiling water for twenty minutes until they reach a chewy texture.
Pulse the rehydrated shrimp in a food processor until finely minced but not a paste.
Mix the minced shrimp with ground pork, beaten eggs, and one tablespoon of shrimp paste in a small bowl.
Sauté the tomatoes in annatto oil in a large pot over medium heat until softened.
Pour the chicken broth into the pot and bring the liquid to a rolling boil.
Scoop small spoonfuls of the pork and shrimp mixture into the boiling broth to form rustic dumplings.
Stir in the remaining shrimp paste and fish sauce then simmer for fifteen minutes.
Place a portion of cooked rice vermicelli noodles into each serving bowl.
Ladle the hot broth and shrimp dumplings over the noodles.
Top each bowl with a generous handful of shredded lettuce and fresh herbs.
